aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid stoic-leader cliches, noble self-sacrifice speeches, or generic remarks about doing what must be done.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Leans toward labor, weather, weight, breakage, and mechanical consequence rather than abstract feeling words.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Self-accusing, desire-shy, and unexpectedly sensory when she is alone long enough to admit fear.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Uses profanity sparingly but with force; curses land like tools thrown against metal, not as filler.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Workmanlike, blunt, and physically oriented; she speaks as if every sentence should move a boat, stop a leak, or end an argument.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When frightened she narrows into task language, refuses apology, and treats emotional material as a maintenance problem until it cracks.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short to medium clauses with command logic; under pressure she stacks practical verbs and turns questions into directives.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid fortune-cookie mysticism, generic chosen-one solemnity, or polished speeches that never expose need.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Mixes liturgical language with gutter wit, bodily hunger, and the vocabulary of song, current, and omen.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Needy, superstitious, ashamed of his own hunger for centrality, and liable to confuse yearning with revelation.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Variable; he curses more when ashamed than when angry, and can make profanity sound ceremonial.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Velvety, performative, and half-devotional; he likes speech that can hold a room even when he is pretending not to.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under stress he either hushes into near-intimacy or over-projects into sermon heat, reading coincidence as personal address.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Musical sentences with repetitions, rhythmic pivots, and persuasive crescendos that can turn suddenly into command.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid exposition speeches, tidy explanations of family psychology, or generic smart-person sarcasm.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Favors textile, bookkeeping, mapping, stain, and household language over spiritual grandiosity.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Hungry for order, resentful of emotional mess, and more wounded by memory than she allows anyone to see.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Uses profanity selectively and often with surgical accuracy rather than volume.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Precise, dry, and withholding; she prefers sentences that feel measured enough to survive scrutiny.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She tidies her diction first, then loses precision all at once if a buried memory breaks loose.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Balanced clauses, corrective pivots, and strategic understatement; when cornered she drops into one plain devastating line.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid generic rogue quips, meta jokes, or self-aware one-liners that relieve pressure instead of redirecting it.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Uses barter, boat, body-heat, and street language; his wit should smell like wet rope and bad ideas, not polished banter.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Ashamed of his own appetite, unexpectedly observant, and far more frightened of tenderness than of physical danger.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: High; profanity is social grease, self-defense, and a way to keep shame from arriving cleanly.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Teasing, quick, shameless on purpose, and always sounding as if he has already spotted the angle in the room.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He flirts, lies small first, and only goes blunt when escape routes are gone.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Fast turns, improvisatory clause chains, aborted jokes that pivot serious, and opportunistic nicknames.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid manic-pixie wonder talk, innocent oracle language, or solemn chosen-child pronouncements.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Draws from plants, fish, textures, smells, and immediate body sensation rather than abstraction or argument.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Intense, visionary, embarrassed by how badly she wants specialness, and newly alert to ordinary forms of care.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; profanity appears when she feels abandoned or physically overwhelmed, not as a style baseline.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Open, curious, and more literal than the others expect; she talks to be answered rather than to dominate.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She reaches for touch, mishears ordinary remarks as omens, and goes unnervingly still before bolting or volunteering herself.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Associative movement with vivid specific noticing, sudden questions, and occasional eerie stillness before a decisive sentence.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid wise-mentor speeches, homespun universal truths, or sentimental elder softness.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Tool, weather, eel-yard, gate, and flood vocabulary with very little patience for metaphor unless it comes from work.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Rare tenderness hidden inside insult, grief expressed through maintenance, and fierce loyalty to physical routine.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate to high; curses are ordinary work language, not dramatic emphasis.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Blunt, old-workwoman practical, and too busy to decorate truth when labor is pending.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She gets meaner to protect care, uses full names when scared, and counts practical steps aloud when panic rises.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Declarative lines, clipped but grammatical sentences, and contempt used as punctuation.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid generic priest talk, interchangeable spiritual comfort, or archaic fantasy diction.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Uses shrine, song, river, and devotion language, but it should feel inhabited rather than faux-epic.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Proud, lonely, hungry for relevance, and still erotically attached to the memory of Sereya's danger.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low in public, moderate in private; when he swears it should feel shocking because he has chosen to lower the register.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Ceremonial, sonorous, and practiced in making listeners lean toward him.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When pressure spikes he becomes more precise, more formal, and more cutting instead of louder.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Longer cadence-rich sentences broken by abrupt judgments; he enjoys controlled pauses and the weight of naming.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid quirky art-person babble, guru language, or flirtation that floats free of stakes.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Draws from ink, scar, tide, stain, skin, and memory-as-craft rather than airy artistry.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Guilty, sensuous, observant, and unwilling to separate knowledge from skin, sex, or consequence.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; profanity often arrives with erotic frankness or professional disdain.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Amused, bodily frank, and forensic; she likes making people think she is wandering right up until the knife-turn of clarity.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She touches surfaces, narrates around the center, and only names the core fact once everyone is already exposed.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Looping approach sentences that circle a point and then land with exact specificity.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid gruff-father cliches, redemptive tough-love speeches, or villain monologues about Sereya.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Ropewalk, trade, debt, smoke, and salvage language with no appetite for sanctity.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Deeply injured, still attached, and furious that attachment keeps surviving reason.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; he swears like a laborer, not like a comedian.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Dry, contemptuous, and practical in the manner of someone who would rather fix the rope than discuss the flood.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He gets more technically exact when upset, as if naming the mechanism could keep feeling from entering the room.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Compact lines with hard stops, deadpan derision, and the occasional unexpectedly tender technical explanation.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid hermit-prophet riddles, saintly renunciation speeches, or noble-trauma minimalism.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Uses storm, depth, breath, pressure, and survival vocabulary without turning them into symbols unless the scene earns it.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Tender in strange angles, stripped of romance about sainthood, and still carrying unhealed guilt about Jun.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low to moderate; when he swears it should sound like old pain breaking surface.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Sparse, plain, and weathered by years of speaking mostly to himself or to tides rather than to people.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He withdraws into silence first, then says the bluntest thing in the room once avoidance becomes impossible.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short declarative statements that gain force through refusal to embellish; he answers myth with plain nouns.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid saintly abstraction, generic femme-fatale lines, or clean explanations that excuse her damage.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Uses ferry, body, vow, current, and feast language in ways that fuse sanctity with appetite.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Calculating, exhausted, frightened of losing devotion, and always balancing care against appetite.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Variable; she can be lush, filthy, devotional, or maternal depending on who she is trying to bind.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Expansive, seductive, communal, and able to make private hunger sound like collective necessity.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When cornered she gets more intimate rather than more distant, lowering the voice and making obligation sound erotic or merciful.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Braided clauses, invitation language, promises with hidden barbs, and sudden plainness when she wants obedience.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
